title: Visual Directions Example
subtitle: Compare visual directions and interaction tone.

sections.heading: Visual Directions in use
sections.body: This template compares visual directions with enough specificity that a reviewer can discuss density, tone, and affordances instead of reacting to a blank moodboard.

cards.title: Editorial white
cards.body: Large type, white page surfaces, restrained rules, and source notes. Closest fit for Making Software-style explainers.

cards.title: Workbench
cards.body: Compact panels, token swatches, small controls, and dense comparison tables for repeated tool use.

cards.title: Teaching canvas
cards.body: Diagram-first composition with callouts, progressive examples, and print-friendly hierarchy.

sections.heading: Example data policy
sections.body: This demo uses invented project data so the template shape is visible without depending on private tickets, customer names, or live metrics.
